prompt: Recolour the pajama set so the MAIN FABRIC of the shirt and shorts matches the LIGHT BLUE woven cotton swatch in the SECOND reference image (a soft dusty light blue). The contrast PIPING along all edges must match the DUSTY ROSE / muted pink woven cotton swatch in the FOURTH reference image. So: light blue garment, dusty rose piping on collar, lapel/placket, cuffs, pocket, and shorts hem. LOCKED SUBJECT (do not alter): the woman, her face, skin, hair, body, pose, hands, crop, and the neutral taupe studio background from the FIRST reference image are FIXED. Keep them pixel-identical. The garment is a short-sleeve camp-collar pajama set: a button-up shirt with a notched/camp collar, a chest patch pocket, short cuffed sleeves, and matching cuffed pajama shorts. Keep the exact same garment shape, fit, seams, buttons, collar shape, pocket, sleeve and hem construction as the first image. ONLY change the fabric colour/material of the garment and the colour of the contrast piping as specified. The contrast piping must run along ALL the same edges shown in the first image: the collar edge, the lapel/front placket, the short-sleeve cuffs, the chest pocket edge, and the shorts hem. Use the THIRD reference image only as the style example for how a single clean contrast piping line sits along the collar and lapel edge. Photorealistic, soft even studio lighting, premium cotton fabric, true-to-swatch colour.
